title: Opening for Production Engineer at Alstom India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Alstom India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Alstom India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Alstom India:
Alstom India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alstom India!
